name: Baldur's Gate 3
description: (Fully Reworked) This story tells one of the land of Faerun. You'll encounter various creatures like Goblins, illithids, animals, gnolls, warriors, monsters, demons, devils, and many creatures from the world of Dungeons and Dragons. You can die, be betrayed, brainwashed, be killed, be tortured or you could find happiness, love and bring out the good in the world... the path is yours to explore.
creator: Vestara
